title: Removed Standalone Tag Write Server
summary: Deleted the retired standalone tag write HTTP server after moving active tag write routes into the local Studio app analytics adapter.
effect: The old standalone tag write HTTP entrypoint is gone. Active tag write endpoints are exposed only by the local Studio app under /studio/api/analytics, activity source refs now point at var/studio/logs/studio_analytics_api.log, and the deprecated /build-docs tag route is absent from the active tag route inventory.
verification: Python compile checks passed for scripts/analytics/tag_routes.py, scripts/analytics/tag_activity.py, scripts/studio/studio_analytics_api.py, tests/python/test_tag_routes.py, tests/python/test_tag_activity.py, and tests/python/test_studio_app_server.py
